archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Clinical Precision

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md
surface_strategies.header: sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150
surface_strategies.upload_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-xl p-12 text-center bg-slate-50 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:border-sky-400 transition-colors

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors bg-sky-600 text-white hover:bg-sky-700 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50
buttons.ghost: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900

status_badges.auto_mapped: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200
status_badges.needs_review: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200
status_badges.unmapped: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-rose-50 text-rose-700 border border-rose-200

table.header_cell: bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-slate-200

icons.style: weight='duotone' for large empty states, weight='regular' for dense tables and UI controls

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Install '@phosphor-icons/react' for icons. Add 'Cabinet Grotesk' via fontsource or google fonts if available, otherwise fallback to Inter/system sans. Add 'IBM Plex Sans' for body and tables.
LAYOUT: Build a clinical dashboard with a left sidebar (Navigation) and a right main content area. The background should be a calming slate-50 to reduce eye strain during long review sessions.
COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI for structural elements (Tables, Buttons, Dropdowns, Dialogs, Sheet for the Review Drawer).
UPLOAD MODULE: Create a large, drag-and-drop file upload zone using the 'upload_zone' surface strategy. It should support CSV/Excel indications.
DASHBOARD: Implement a 4-card 'Control Room' KPI grid at the top showing: Total Values, Auto-Mapped (Green), Needs Review (Amber), Unmapped (Red).

REVIEW WORKBENCH: The core of the app. A dense, highly readable data table using IBM Plex Sans. Include a 'Confidence Score' column with a visual progress bar or color-coded badge. Clicking a row should open a Shadcn Sheet (Side Drawer) to edit synonyms and mappings without losing the table context.
INTERACTIVITY: Ensure all hover states explicitly define text colors. Use sticky headers for the data table. Add bulk action checkboxes on the left column of the table.
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='upload-file-button', data-testid='approve-mapping-row-1').
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards, especially for the status badges and confidence scores.
